backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing authorization, user profiles, conversations, messages, and gallery item storage with permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose and behavior of various frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base setup defining light/dark theme CSS variables and global styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entrypoint that loads the main React application and sets the Busy AI favicon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring TanStack Router routes, theme provider, and global layout structure.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Auth guard that redirects unauthenticated users and shows a branded loading or redirect screen.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting authenticated first‑time users to save their display name using profile queries.
frontend/src/components/background/Butte: Generates animated butterfly SVG elements with randomized positions and animation properties as a decorative background.
Renders labeled horizontal bars with proportional widths based on numeric values.
Draws a pie chart using SVG arcs and displays a legend for each data segment.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatCompose: Provides an input box and send button for composing and submitting chat messages.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatMessage: Displays chat messages with user/assistant styling and auto-scrolls to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/gallery/GalleryC: Shows a gallery item with type-specific styling, metadata, and buttons for viewing or downloading.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Displays the user avatar and menu with profile info and logout functionality.
Wraps the app layout with sidebar navigation, header, background, and mobile drawer support.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Sideb: Renders the main navigation menu with active-route highlighting and optional callback on navigation.
frontend/src/components/video/VideoPrevi: Shows a stylized preview of a video draft with animated text based on selected style.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatSession.ts: Maintains chat history per user, persists messages to local storage, and generates canned assistant replies.
frontend/src/hooks/useGalleryItems.ts: Fetches gallery items filtered by item type.
frontend/src/hooks/useGalleryPublish.ts: Provides functions to publish photo, video, or analytic items to the gallery.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity auth, handling identity loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useMakerDraft.ts: Manages photo or video draft data in localStorage with load, update, and clear helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Wraps react-query hooks to fetch and mutate user profiles and gallery items via an actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedAnalytics.ts: Saves and retrieves per‑identity analytics data from localStorage and appends new entries.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind styles, theme variables, gradients, animations, and UI utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/analytics/compute.ts: Computes profit metrics and returns structured bar and pie chart data from financial inputs.
frontend/src/lib/chat/cannedReplies.ts: Generates predefined chat responses based on keyword detection in user messages.
frontend/src/lib/poster/renderPosterToCa: Renders a styled poster onto a canvas using gradients and text from a draft object.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with query and Internet Identity providers and renders the root component.
frontend/src/pages/BusinessAnalyticsPage: Collects financial inputs, computes analytics, displays charts, and saves reports to user analytics or gallery.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Displays the chat interface with message list, composer, and actions for new or cleared chats.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Displays gallery items with tab filtering and shows loading, grid, or empty states.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles Internet Identity login and redirects authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/MakerLandingPage.tsx: Landing page listing photo and video maker features with navigation to their setup flows.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoD: Collects business details for photo poster creation and saves them to a draft before continuing.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoR: Renders the final poster to a canvas and allows downloading or saving it to the gallery.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoT: Lets users choose a poster theme, updates the draft, and proceeds to result generation.
frontend/src/pages/ShopMakerPage.tsx: Introduces the upcoming Shop Maker tool and shows feature previews with a notify option.
frontend/src/pages/video-for-reels/Video: Captures business information for video creation and saves it to a draft before moving to style selection.
Displays the generated video preview with options to export a preview animation or save the video draft to the gallery.
Lets users choose a video animation style and saves the selection before navigating to the preview page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helper functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS theme, colors, typography, animations, and plugins for the project.
project_state.json: Contains the project's current state, requirements, visual theme direction, known issues, and feature tracking metadata.
